findings.message: __dirname usage in loadPrompt() may be fragile under jiti ESM transforms; consider import.meta.dirname fallback
Markdown generation in finalize_plan uses string concatenation; could use template engine for complex cases
Integration test (step 9) was initially deferred; now completed — extension installed and verified via pi install + pi list
package.json dependencies fixed: removed unused @earendil-works/pi-tui, replaced typebox with @earendil-works/pi-ai, replaced * ranges with ^0.75.0
State machine for sequential execution (INV-11) added: activeWorkerId guard in loom_spawn_worker
System prompts extracted from inline code to separate files: prompts/plan-orchestrator.md and prompts/agent-executor.md
loom_spawn_subagent tool added to Plan Mode for research/analysis subagents during planning
Runtime validation added: readJson now accepts optional validator fn; schemas.ts provides validateTaskShape, validatePlanShape, validateRegistryShape, validateReviewShape

recommendations: All previously identified issues have been addressed. Step 9 integration test completed (extension installed and registered in pi). plan.json step statuses corrected. Ready for final commit.
